items.title: Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Sink Into Violent Cycle After Latest Strikes
items.summary: Attacks on ships were followed by new U.S. strikes on Iran, which responded by firing at Gulf nations. The pattern of hostilities has all but collapsed a cease-fire, with little...

items.title: "Terror Camps Crumbled During Op Sindoor": PM To Indian Diaspora In Melbourne
items.summary: "During Operation Sindoor, you must have seen the explosions that struck terrorist hideouts. Those explosions have resonated across the world," he said.
